pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm G. It’s a bit nerve-wracking just sitting around waiting for things to kick off, isn't it? How are you feeling about all this?
Hi G, I'm I. It's definitely tense. I'm just trying to stay focused since I've got people back home counting on me. How are you holding up?
I'm hanging in there. I feel that pressure too; I've got people I care about who could really use the win. It makes the stakes feel a lot higher, doesn't it?
It really does. It's hard not to think about how much this could change things for them. Have you heard anything about what the game actually involves yet?
Not a word. They’re keeping us in the dark, which only makes the waiting harder. Have you picked up on any rumors?
No, nothing at all. It’s weirdly quiet. I’m just trying to keep my head straight until it starts. Have you talked to anyone else yet?
Just a couple of people briefly, but everyone seems pretty guarded. It's hard to tell what anyone is thinking when there's this much money on the line.
I can't say I blame them, honestly. It’s tough to know who to trust when everyone’s eye is on the same prize.
That's the truth. I guess we'll just have to see how everyone acts once the money is actually on the table.
Exactly. I'm going to take a moment to clear my head before things get moving. Good luck, G.
Thanks, I. Good luck to you too—hopefully we both get what we came for.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
It was a pleasure working with you. I am glad we both walked away with the fair share of $10,000.
